definitions: The state or quality of being live or alive.
The property of a system or process to continue making progress or to eventually complete its task, rather than becoming deadlocked or stalled.
The quality of being broadcast or performed in real-time, as opposed to being pre-recorded.
examples: The liveness of the broadcast added to the excitement.
Ensuring the liveness of the concurrent program is crucial.
The liveness of the performance captivated the audience.
